creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
On 2012-11-21 07:26, Yuri wrote:
> Attn. bugzilla@
> This is the patch to update devel/bugzilla to 4.2.4.
> Please check in ASAP.
> 
> Updated patch:
> * Fixed file list.
> * Added 'chown' to www:www as it should be in FreeBSD so that 
> bugzilla user is the same as in apache installation.
> 
> Yuri
> 

Hi Yuri,

please use devel/bugzilla42 which is already version 4.2.4.

chown www:www is not needed since the permissions are set during
checksetup. The www user should have no write access but the group
www should have executable rights which is set during checksetup.

--
Regards,
olli
